'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 128''' was the one hundred twenty-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 9]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Liz Holliday]] and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[Battle of Jabiim]]
*[[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]]
*[[:Category:Healers and doctors|Healing and Healers]]
*[[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Fay]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Lourdes]]
*[[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]
*Galactic Food and Drink
*[[DZ-70 fugitive tracker droid|DZ-70 Fugitive Tracker]]
*[[Padmé Amidala/Legends#Costumes|Garments and Couture]]
*[[SunGem|Master Arca's Ship]]
